use clap::{Parser, ArgGroup};

#[derive(Parser)]
#[command(group(
    ArgGroup::new("output_format")
        .args(["json", "text"])
        .multiple(false)
))]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long)]
    json: bool,

    #[arg(long)]
    text: bool,

    #[arg(long, group = "filter_group")]
    include: Vec<String>,

    #[arg(long, group = "filter_group", conflicts_with = "include")]
    exclude: Vec<String>,
}

fn run(cli: Cli) {
    if cli.json {
        println!("json mode");
    } else {
        println!("text mode");
    }
}
